step_rationale: Platelet activation signaling; EPC mobilization and vascular repair.
mechanism: PI3K signaling drives platelet activation and endothelial progenitor cell mobilization, regulating thrombotic and reparative responses.

references.title: Gintonin modulates platelet function and inhibits thrombus formation via impaired glycoprotein VI signaling.
Pharmacological approaches to improve endothelial repair mechanisms.
